exercises.title: Word Family Expansion
exercises.description:
Expand each root word into its family (noun, verb, adjective, adverb):
1. decide
2. success
3. help
4. possible
5. beauty
hints: Think: what changes when you add -tion, -ful, -ly, -ness?

solution.code:
1. decide (v) → decision (n) → decisive (adj) → decisively (adv)
2. succeed (v) → success (n) → successful (adj) → successfully (adv)
3. help (v/n) → helpful (adj) → helpless (adj) → helpfully (adv)
4. possible (adj) → possibility (n) → possibly (adv) → impossible (adj)
5. beautiful (adj) → beauty (n) → beautify (v) → beautifully (adv)

exercises.title: Collocation Matching
exercises.description:
Match the correct verb with each noun:
___ a decision    (make/do)
___ homework      (make/do)
___ progress      (make/do)
___ exercise      (make/do)
___ a mistake     (make/do)
___ a favor       (make/do)

solution.code:
make a decision
do homework
make progress
do exercise
make a mistake
do a favor

exercises.title: Prefix Power
exercises.description:
Add the correct prefix to make the opposite:
1. ___happy
2. ___agree
3. ___possible
4. ___logical
5. ___responsible
6. ___legal
hints: un- = not, dis- = opposite, in-/im- = not, il-/ir- = not
Check which prefix goes with which word

solution.code:
1. unhappy (un-)
2. disagree (dis-)
3. impossible (im-)
4. illogical (il-)
5. irresponsible (ir-)
6. illegal (il-)

exercises.title: Context Clues
exercises.description:
Read each sentence and guess the meaning of the underlined word:
1. The arid desert had no water for months.
2. She was elated when she got the promotion.
3. The politician's ambiguous answer frustrated voters.
4. His meticulous attention to detail impressed everyone.
5. The abandoned building was full of dust.
hints: Look at the surrounding words for clues
What situation would cause this reaction?

solution.code:
1. arid = very dry
2. elated = extremely happy/joyful
3. ambiguous = unclear, open to interpretation
4. meticulous = extremely careful and thorough
5. abandoned = left empty, no longer used
